text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Since I played longer with goinstall, I found that installing some
modules with this tool, goinstall rebuilt some other modules from base
distribution, making them unusable. And I must rebuild whole Go.

So it's better leave goinstall not working this time.
